name: operant
description: Self-hosted agents in Slack. Per-user OAuth, per-human audit, RBAC, approvals. Control plane for OpenClaw.
author: Tomas Cupr <work@tomcupr.com>

scripts.verify: pnpm verify:scripts && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm dashboard:e2e && pnpm verify:compose && pnpm verify:deploy
scripts.verify:scripts: node --check scripts/operant-init-env.mjs && node scripts/operant-init-env.mjs --self-test-arg-validation && node scripts/operant-init-env.mjs --self-test-permissions && node --check scripts/slack-scope-contract.mjs && node scripts/slack-scope-contract.mjs --self-test && node --check scripts/slack-manifest-probe.mjs && node scripts/slack-manifest-probe.mjs --self-test && node --check scripts/slack-socket-mode-probe.mjs && node scripts/slack-socket-mode-probe.mjs --self-test && node --check scripts/slack-dm-manual-probe.mjs && node scripts/slack-dm-manual-probe.mjs --self-test && node --check scripts/slack-user-token-exchange.mjs && node scripts/slack-user-token-exchange.mjs --self-test && node --check scripts/slack-user-token-post-probe.mjs && node scripts/slack-user-token-post-probe.mjs --self-test && node --check scripts/operant-doctor.mjs && node scripts/operant-doctor.mjs --self-test-arg-validation && node scripts/operant-doctor.mjs --self-test-env-validation && node scripts/operant-doctor.mjs --self-test-live-preflight && node --check scripts/operant-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/operant-dashboard-e2e.mjs && node --check scripts/operant-report-redaction.mjs && node --check scripts/operant-verify-report-redaction.mjs && node scripts/operant-verify-report-redaction.mjs && node --check scripts/operant-live-e2e.mjs && node scripts/operant-live-e2e.mjs --self-test-arg-validation && node scripts/operant-live-e2e.mjs --self-test-env-loading && node scripts/operant-live-e2e.mjs --self-test-identity-consistency && node scripts/operant-live-e2e.mjs --self-test-openclaw-assertions && node scripts/operant-live-e2e.mjs --self-test-transient-retry && node --check scripts/operant-compose.mjs && node scripts/operant-compose.mjs --self-test-redaction && node scripts/operant-compose.mjs --dry-run --env .env.example config && node scripts/operant-compose.mjs --dry-run --env .env.example --profile queue config && node scripts/operant-compose.mjs --dry-run --env .env.example --file docker-compose.sandbox.yml config && node --check scripts/operant-compose-e2e.mjs && node scripts/operant-compose-e2e.mjs --self-test-arg-validation && node --check scripts/operant-handoff.mjs && node scripts/operant-handoff.mjs --self-test && node --check scripts/operant-completion-audit.mjs && node --check scripts/operant-verify-completion-audit.mjs && node scripts/operant-verify-completion-audit.mjs && node --check scripts/operant-final-report.mjs && node --check scripts/operant-local-acceptance.mjs && node scripts/operant-local-acceptance.mjs --self-test-arg-validation && node scripts/operant-local-acceptance.mjs --self-test-final-report-artifact && node --check scripts/operant-verify-compose.mjs && node --check scripts/operant-verify-deploy.mjs
